policy: Audiobook UI must fail closed unless approved manifest and release evidence prove availability.

classifications.evidence: BookCard and BookDetail paths use audiobookReleaseState/canShowControls. Strict smoke found zero visible Listen CTA instances across final matrix.
Active JsonLd routes emit Book/Article only; tests and packets assert AudioObject absence for non-approved audio.
Static same-origin /audio/ appears in release-safety tests as a blocked case. Service worker source check forbids static /audio/ caching.
No active Reader or player source exposes browser/system speech fallback.
Public copy uses section-following narration where audio is approved; tests assert no word-level sync copy.

AudioPlayer returns null without audiobookReleaseState approval. Reader waveform/progress controls are behind canExposeAudiobookControls. Strict smoke found zero non-approved visible metadata/control instances.
Component exists under frontend/src/components/Internal and is not imported by public routes.
Remaining Library/BookCard Notify Me links route to /contact?interest=... and are separated from audio/listening claims.
